articles.title: The UK's summers are getting hotter - but how prepared are we?
articles.description: Based on current trends parts of the UK are set to see 40C summers regularly within a couple of decades.

articles.title: Burnham likely to replace Reeves as chancellor if he becomes PM
articles.description: Rachel Reeves would be offered a more junior cabinet role, the BBC understands.

articles.title: Families call for justice ahead of landmark maternity review publication
articles.description: The review of Nottingham University Hospitals (NUH) NHS Trust is expected to detail how failings led to deaths and avoidable harm.

articles.title: England handed reality check by Ghana but remain in strong position after 0-0 draw
articles.description: England's drab performance against Ghana is no cause to panic – but it will not have struck fear into their rivals, writes Phil McNulty.
